description: Per content_type corpus count ranges for check 3.1 corpus_counts. Calibrated against NEW project (mgrmucazfiibsomdmndh) 21/04/2026 post-S184 state (post-cutover + post-S183 dedup + post-S184 WP1 TS dedup). Ranges allow current live state to pass while still catching regressions. NOTE: capability/case_study/certification are draft-only on current NEW state and will grow after S186 re-ingest — min=0 permits the current zero count, max covers expected post-re-ingest growth.
